## Implementation Summary

**What was built:** `normalizeOrderEvent(raw: RawOrderEvent, logger: Logger): NormalizedOrderEvent` тАФ a pure TypeScript function (pure except for `logger.warn` on unknown status) that maps raw upstream order events to a canonical internal shape.

**Approach:** A `STATUS_MAP` lookup table handles AC1тАУAC3 in O(1) with zero branching logic per status. Anything not in the map falls through to `"unknown"` + warn (AC4). Cents-to-dollars uses `toFixed(2)` parsed back to `number` to avoid floating-point drift (AC5). A `!= null` guard (covers both `undefined` and `null`) handles the anonymous fallback (AC6). No external deps.

**Files:**

| Path | Action | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `.tmp/normalizeOrderEvent.ts` | created | Types + implementation |
| `.tmp/normalizeOrderEvent.test.ts` | created | 16 tests covering all 6 ACs + edge cases |

---

## Acceptance Criteria Coverage

| Criterion | Status | Test | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| AC1: `"PAID"` тЖТ `"completed"` | тЬЕ implemented | `maps "PAID" to "completed"` | |
| AC2: `"REFUNDED"` тЖТ `"refunded"` | тЬЕ implemented | `maps "REFUNDED" to "refunded"` | |
| AC3: `"FAILED"\|"DECLINED"` тЖТ `"failed"` | тЬЕ implemented | Two separate tests, one per value | |
| AC4: Unknown status тЖТ `"unknown"` + `logger.warn` | тЬЕ implemented | `"PROCESSING"`, `""`, lowercase `"paid"` + no-warn-for-known | Case-sensitivity enforced |
| AC5: `total_amount` cents тЖТ dollars (2 dp float) | тЬЕ implemented | 4 value tests (1000, 199, 0, 150 cents) | Uses `toFixed(2)` to avoid floating-point drift |
| AC6: Missing/null `customer_name` тЖТ `"Anonymous"` | тЬЕ implemented | `undefined`, `null`, and present-value tests | `!= null` guard covers both |

---

## Confidence Assessment

```
confidence:
  level: 98
  high_confidence_areas:
    - Status mapping (AC1тАУAC4) тАФ lookup table is exhaustive and case-sensitive
    - Cents-to-dollars (AC5) тАФ toFixed(2) + parseFloat is the idiomatic TS pattern
    - Null/undefined guard (AC6)
  low_confidence_areas:
    - Empty-string customer_name: spec says "missing or null" тАФ treated as Anonymous
      (empty string feels like bad data, same default applied)
  assumptions:
    - Status matching is intentionally case-sensitive (AC4 test confirms "paid" тЖТ unknown)
    - Empty string customer_name should also default to "Anonymous" (defensive)
    - Logger interface only requires warn(); no other log-level methods assumed
```
